test_cases.title: Search with special characters returns results safely without a server error
steps: Enter a search query containing quotes and angle brackets
test_cases.expected_result: Search results are returned safely with no server error or crash

test_cases.title: Search with ampersands and special characters completes gracefully
steps: Enter a search query containing ampersands and double quotes
test_cases.expected_result: The search completes without error; results or an empty set are returned gracefully

test_cases.title: Malformed input does not cause a 500 error or expose system internals
steps: Enter a query with a mix of special characters and submit
test_cases.expected_result: The system returns a handled response; no internal error details are exposed to the user

notes: Covers safe result return and graceful handling of special characters. Explicit injection (SQL metacharacters) and XSS output-encoding tests were not included in this pass — these should be added in a follow-up.
